seoTitle: Appin South vs Apsley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Appin South and Apsley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Appin South vs Apsley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Appin South and Apsley.
heading: Appin South vs Apsley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Appin South, Victoria and Apsley, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Apsley has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Appin South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Appin South or Apsley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Appin South has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Apsley scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Appin South scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Apsley scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Appin South or Apsley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Apsley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
